name: Lovely's 50/50
teaser: Some people make pizza, Sarah Minnick makes art. Seasonal ingredients and combinations you won't find anywhere else.
review: Some people make pizza, Sarah Minnick makes art. A flavorful whole wheat crust unlike any other, with seasonal ingredients and combinations you won't find anywhere else in the world.
headsUp: Way out in Sullivan County, NY. Worth every mile.
update: Still producing the most exciting seasonal pies in the Northeast.
address: 4039 N Mississippi Ave, Portland, OR 97217, USA
hours: Monday: 5:00 – 10:00 PM · Tuesday: 5:00 – 10:00 PM · Wednesday: 5:00 – 10:00 PM · Thursday: 5:00 – 10:00 PM · Friday: 5:00 – 10:00 PM · Saturday: 5:00 – 10:00 PM · Sunday: 5:00 – 10:00 PM
